# Ace Terra

> Ace Terra is an 11-acre luxury residential project by ACE Group (ACE Infracity Developers Pvt. Ltd.) in Sector 22D, Yamuna Expressway, Greater Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India. The project offers ~1,166 residences of 3 BHK, 3 BHK+SQ, and 4 BHK+SQ apartments across 12 towers (G+25 floors each), with over 70% open greens. Starting price ₹1.77 Crore. Possession December 2028. RERA: UPRERAPRJ683816 (UP-RERA).

## Key Facts

- **Project name**: Ace Terra
- **Developer**: ACE Group (ACE Infracity Developers Pvt. Ltd.)
- **Location**: Sector 22D, Yamuna Expressway, Greater Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India
- **Site address**: Plot P5 & P6, TS-02/A, Sector 22D, YEIDA, GB Nagar, UP
- **Project area**: ~11 acres, over 70% open greens
- **Total residences**: ~1,166
- **Towers**: 12 towers, G+25 floors each
- **Units per floor**: 4
- **Lifts per tower**: 4
- **Configurations**: 3 BHK | 3 BHK + Servant Quarter | 4 BHK + Servant Quarter
- **Unit sizes**:
  - 3 BHK: 1,770 sq ft
  - 3 BHK + SQ: 2,395 sq ft
  - 4 BHK + SQ: 3,025 sq ft
- **Pricing**:
  - 3 BHK: From ₹1.77 Crore
  - 3 BHK + SQ: From ~₹2.40 Crore
  - 4 BHK + SQ: From ~₹3.02 Crore
- **Possession**: December 2028
- **Construction started**: February 2024
- **RERA number**: UPRERAPRJ683816
- **RERA authority**: Uttar Pradesh Real Estate Regulatory Authority (UP-RERA, up-rera.in)
- **Clubhouse**: Club Spade
- **Contact**: +91 94122 34688
- **WhatsApp**: 919412234688
- **Official site**: https://aceterrayamunaexpressway.in/
- **Developer site**: https://www.acegroupindia.com/
- **CMD**: Ajay Chaudhary (founded ~2010)

## Location & Connectivity

- Jewar International Airport (Noida International Airport, under construction): ~15–20 km
- Yamuna Expressway: direct frontage
- Buddh International Circuit: ~10 km
- Pari Chowk (Greater Noida): ~20 km
- Film City (proposed): nearby
- Galgotias University: ~8 km
- Delhi-Mumbai Expressway: connectivity
- Agra: ~160 km via Yamuna Expressway
- Proposed Metro connectivity

## Amenities

Club Spade clubhouse, swimming pool with poolside cabanas, jacuzzi, tennis court, squash court, billiards room, basketball court, mini theatre, state-of-the-art gym, banquet hall, multi-cuisine cafeteria, business lounge, library, unisex salon, themed gardens, yoga deck, amphitheatre, jogging track, cycling path, kids play area, water features, meditation zone, senior citizen area, multi-sport courts, 24x7 security, CCTV surveillance, power backup, rainwater harvesting, STP.

## Residence Specifications

- **3 BHK (1,770 sq ft)**: Three bedrooms, living-dining area, modular kitchen, utility area, balconies. From ₹1.77 Crore.
- **3 BHK + SQ (2,395 sq ft)**: Three bedrooms with servant quarter, spacious living-dining, premium kitchen, multiple balconies. From ~₹2.40 Crore.
- **4 BHK + SQ (3,025 sq ft)**: Four bedrooms with servant quarter, grand living spaces, premium finishes, panoramic views. From ~₹3.02 Crore.

## About ACE Group

ACE Group (ACE Infracity Developers Pvt. Ltd.) is a prominent real estate developer in the Delhi-NCR region, founded by CMD Ajay Chaudhary around 2010. Known for residential, commercial, and township projects, the group has over two decades of experience and has delivered millions of sq ft of space across Greater Noida and the Yamuna Expressway corridor. Key projects include Ace City, Ace Divino, Ace Parkway, Ace Platinum, and Ace Golf Shire. Headquarters: 7th Floor, Plot No. 01B, Sector-126, Gautam Budh Nagar, UP 201303.

## Payment Plan (CLP — Indicative)

| Milestone | Payment |
|-----------|---------|
| On Booking | 10% of BSP |
| Within 30 Days | 15% of BSP |
| Foundation | 15% of BSP |
| Superstructure 50% | 15% of BSP |
| Superstructure 100% | 15% of BSP |
| Brickwork & Plaster | 10% of BSP |
| Flooring & Fixtures | 10% of BSP |
| Possession | 10% of BSP + Other Charges |

## Disclaimer

Information is indicative and subject to change. Prices, sizes and specifications should be verified directly with the developer and on the UP-RERA portal (up-rera.in) before booking. RERA Registration No.: UPRERAPRJ683816.
